# GarvinLabs

> AI consulting and implementation for lean teams. Fixed price. 2–4 week delivery.

GarvinLabs is an AI consulting and implementation practice run by Garvin Chanderia, based in Pune, India. We help SaaS teams, D2C brands, and modern businesses find where AI actually fits in their operations — then build the systems. No retainers. No strategy decks. Working systems, delivered.

## Services

- [AI Diagnostic](https://garvinlabs.vercel.app/#offers): Written opportunity map of your ops or revenue stack. Top 3 AI + automation opportunities ranked by $ impact, scoped and priced for build. $200 flat. Delivered in 72 hours.
- [AI Implementation](https://garvinlabs.vercel.app/#offers): 1–3 connected AI + automation systems built, tested, and handed off with documentation. $600–$2,400. Delivered in 1–4 weeks.
- [Full System Build](https://garvinlabs.vercel.app/#offers): Production-grade end-to-end automation across your ops or revenue stack. QA, monitoring, runbooks, and 30-day post-launch support included. $6K–$12K. Delivered in 6–12 weeks.

## Ideal Clients

- SaaS teams drowning in manual ops (onboarding, support triage, reporting)
- D2C brands with high cart abandonment or manual win-back workflows
- Founders and operators who want AI in their stack but don't know where to start

## Tools & Stack

n8n (workflow automation), WhatsApp Business API, Shopify webhooks, Claude AI, GPT, and whatever CRM or data tool lives in your existing stack.

## Proof

- 25+ builds delivered across SaaS, D2C, and enterprise
- 938 personalized pages automated for a single client
- 40% workflow turnaround reduction at a Fortune 500 client
- 7 industries served: manufacturing, healthcare, logistics, and more

## Process

1. Book the $200 Diagnostic via WhatsApp or email
2. Receive a written opportunity map within 72 hours
3. Choose what to build — fixed price, fixed scope, fixed date
4. Systems shipped with full documentation and walkthrough

- WhatsApp: +91 93562 49535
- Email: labs.garvin@gmail.com
- Website: https://garvinlabs.vercel.app

## About

Garvin Chanderia is an AI consultant and builder based in Pune, India. Former BI developer (25+ Power BI dashboards, Fortune 500), product consultant (enterprise architecture), and founder (ThrottleApp: 300+ organic downloads, 0 ad spend). Microsoft AI PM Professional Certificate. B.Tech Computer Science, AI/ML specialization.
